message:
test(vectordb): add lib target and comprehensive integration test suite

Exposes fcp_vectordb as a library crate for test imports and adds 1878
lines of mock-only integration tests covering schema validation, error
taxonomy mapping, retry/idempotency semantics, credential redaction,
payload bounds, timeouts, introspection completeness, and capability
verification. Addresses bead flywheel_connectors-lszk.26.3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,10 @@ license.workspace = true
 repository.workspace = true
 authors.workspace = true
 
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_vectordb"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fcp-vectordb"
 path = "src/main.rs"
